sectiondef.header: Interrupt Types for setting up Callbacks

briefdescription.para: A frame sync event interrupt type.
A signal lock event interrupt type.

sectiondef.header: Address gap between two register next to each other

briefdescription.para: Field ID Output Polarity Source Mask.
Active Chroma Output Polarity Source Mask.
Active Video Output Polarity Source Mask.
Horizontal Sync Output Polarity Source Mask.
Vertical Sync Output Polarity Source Mask.
Horizontal Blank Output Polarity Source Mask.
Vertical Blank Output Polarity Source Mask.
Generator Chroma Polarity and Encoding Source Select Mask.
Generator Vertical Blank Offset Source Select Mask.
Generator Vertical Sync End (Back porch start) Source Select Mask.
Generator Vertical Sync Start Source Select Mask.
Generator Vertical Active Size Source Select Mask.
Generator Vertical Total Source Select (Frame Size) Mask.
Horizontal Back Porch Start Register Source Select (Sync End) Mask.
Horizontal Sync Start Register Source Select Mask.
Horizontal Front Porch Start Register Source Select (Active Size) Mask.
Horizontal Total Register Source Select (Frame Size) Mask.
Bit mask for all source select Mask.

sectiondef.header: Version Register Bit Definition and Shifts
Generator/Detector Active Video Size Register Bit Definitions and

briefdescription.para: Total number of lines (including blanking) for frame or field 1.
Bit shift for End Cycle or Line Count.
Horizontal Active Frame Size.The width of the frame without blanking in number of pixels or clocks.

detaileddescription.para: Set High when all signals have locked. (Detector only) Mask

briefdescription.para: Generator Active Chroma Pixel Skip/Parity Mask.
Bit shift for Active Chroma Line Parity.
Generator Active Chroma Line Skip/parity Mask.
Bit mask for all polarity bits Mask.

sectiondef.header: Generator/Detector Full Vertical Size Register Bit Definitions

briefdescription.para: Total number of lines (including blanking) for frame or field 1.
Bit shift for End Cycle or Line Count.
Total number of lines (including blanking) for frame or field 0.

sectiondef.header: Generator/Detector Sync/Blank Register Bit Definitions and Shift

briefdescription.para: End cycle or line count of horizontal sync, vertical sync or vertical blank.
Bit shift for End Cycle or Line Count.
Start cycle or line count of horizontal sync, vertical sync or vertical blank.

sectiondef.header: Generator/Detector VBlank/VSync Horizontal Bit Definitions and Shift

briefdescription.para: Vertical line count during which current Frame Sync is active Mask.
Bit shift for the vertical line count.
Horizontal cycle count during which current Frame Sync is active Mask.

sectiondef.header: VTC Generator Global Delay Bit Definition and Shift

briefdescription.para: Total lines per frame to delay generator output Mask.
Bit shift for the total lines.
Total clock cycles per line to delay generator output Mask.
This function macro reads the given register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the VTC core.
is the register offset of the register (defined at top of this file).

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XVtc_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the VTC core.
is the register offset of the register (defined at top of this file) to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write to the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XVtc_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: This typedef enumerates the list of vertical front porch stretch mechanism supported by VTC core.
Callback type for all interrupts except error interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the callback functions, and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked.
is a bit mask indicating the cause of the event. For current core version, this parameter is "OR" of 0 or more XVTC_IXR_*_MASK constants defined in xvtc_hw.h.
is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the callback functions, and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked.
is a bit mask indicating the cause of the error. For current core version, this parameter always have value 0 and could be ignored.

briefdescription.para: This routine is a stub for the asynchronous callbacks.

detaileddescription.para: The stub is here in case the upper layer forgot to set the handlers. On initialization, all handlers except error handler are set to this callback. It is considered an error for this handler to be invoked.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the callback functions, and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This routine is a stub for the asynchronous error interrupt callback.

detaileddescription.para: The stub is here in case the upper layer forgot to set the handler. On initialization, Error interrupt handler is set to this callback. It is considered an error for this handler to be invoked.

parameterdescription.para: is a callback reference passed in by the upper layer when setting the callback functions, and passed back to the upper layer when the callback is invoked.
is a bit mask indicating the cause of the error. Its value equals 'OR'ing one or more XVTC_IXR_*_MASK values defined in xvtc_hw.h.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the VTC core.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the VTC core. Initialization of the VTC includes setting up the instance data, and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC core instance to be worked on.
points to the configuration structure associated with the VTC core.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the VTC Generator core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the VTC Detector core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the Detector and Generator at same time of the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the VTC Generator core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the VTC Detector core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the Detector and Generator at same time of the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the output polarity of the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
points to a Polarity configuration structure with the setting to use on the VTC core.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the output polarity setting used by the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
points to a Polarity configuration structure that will be populated with the setting used on the VTC core after this function returns.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the input polarity setting used by the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
points to a Polarity configuration structure that will be populated with the setting used on the VTC core after this function returns.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the source selecting of the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on
points to a Source Selecting configuration structure with the setting to use on the VTC device.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the source select setting used by the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
points to a source select configuration structure that will be populated with the setting used on the VTC core after this function returns.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the line skip setting of the Generator in the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
indicates whether to skip 1 line between active chroma for the Generator module. Use Non-0 value for this parameter to skip 1 line, and 0 to not skip lines.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the line skip setting used by the Generator in the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.

will point to the value indicating whether one line is skipped between active chroma for the Generator module after this function returns. Value 1 means that 1 line is skipped and zero means that no lines are skipped.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the pixel skip setting of the Generator in the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
indicates whether to skip 1 pixel between active chroma for the Generator module. Use Non-0 value for this parameter to skip 1 pixel, and 0 to not skip pixels

briefdescription.para: This function gets the pixel skip setting used by the Generator in the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.

will point to the value indicating whether one pixel is skipped between active chroma for the Generator module after this function returns. Value 1 means that 1 pixel is skipped and zero means that no pixels are skipped.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the Generator delay setting of the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
indicates the number of total lines per frame to delay the generator output. The valid range is from 0 to 4095.
indicates the number of total clock cycles per line to delay the generator output. The valid range is from 0 to 4095.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the Generator delay setting used by the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
will point to a value indicating the number of total lines per frame to delay the generator output after this function returns.
will point to a value indicating the number of total clock cycles per line to delay the generator output after this function returns.

memberdef.argsstring: (XVtc *InstancePtr, u16 FrameSyncIndex, u16 VertStart, u16 HoriStart)
memberdef.name: XVtc_SetFSync

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the SYNC setting of a frame sync used by the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
indicates the index number of the frame sync. The valid range is from 0 to 15.
indicates the vertical line count during which the frame sync is active. The valid range is from 0 to 4095.
indicates the horizontal cycle count during which the frame sync is active. The valid range is from 0 to 4095.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the SYNC setting of a frame sync used by the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
indicates the index number of the frame sync. The valid range is from 0 to 15.
will point to the value that indicates the vertical line count during which the frame sync is active once this function returns.
will point to the value that indicates the horizontal cycle count during which the frame sync is active once this function returns.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the VBlank/VSync Horizontal Offsets for the Generator in a VTC device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC device instance to be worked on.
points to a VBlank/VSync Horizontal Offset configuration with the setting to use on the VTC device.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the VBlank/VSync Horizontal Offsets currently used by the Generator in the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
points to a VBlank/VSync Horizontal Offset configuration structure that will be populated with the setting currently used on the Generator in the given VTC device after this function returns.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the VBlank/VSync Horizontal Offsets detected by the Detector in the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
points to a VBlank/VSync Horizontal Offset configuration structure that will be populated with the setting detected on the Detector in the given VTC device after this function returns.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up VTC signal to be used by the Generator module in the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
is a pointer to the VTC signal configuration to be used by the Generator module in the VTC core.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the VTC signal setting used by the Generator module in the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
is a pointer to a VTC signal configuration which will be populated with the setting used by the Generator module in the VTC core once this function returns.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the VTC signal setting used by the Detector module in the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
is a pointer to a VTC signal configuration which will be populated with the setting used by the Detector module in the VTC core once this function returns.

briefdescription.para: This function facilitates software identification of exact version of the VTC hardware (h/w).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVtc instance.

simplesect.para: Version, contents of a Version register.

briefdescription.para: This function converts the video mode integer into the video timing information stored within the XVtc_Timing pointer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
is a u16 int defined as macro to one of the predefined Video Modes.
is a pointer to a VTC Video Timing Structure.

briefdescription.para: This function converts the video timing structure into the VTC signal configuration structure, horizontal offsets structure and the polarity structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
is a pointer to a Video Timing structure to be read.
is a pointer to a VTC signal configuration to be set.
is a pointer to a VTC horizontal offsets structure to be set.
is a pointer to a VTC polarity structure to be set.

briefdescription.para: This function converts the VTC signal structure, horizontal offsets structure and the polarity structure into the Video Timing structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
is a pointer to a VTC signal configuration to be read
is a pointer to a VTC horizontal offsets structure to be read
is a pointer to a VTC polarity structure to be read.
is a pointer to a Video Timing structure to be set.

briefdescription.para: This function converts the video timing structure into predefined video mode values returned as a short integer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
is a pointer to a Video Timing structure to be read.

simplesect.para: VideoMode is the video mode of the VTC core.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the generator (Polarity, H/V values and horizontal offsets) by reading the configuration from a video timing structure.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
is a pointer to a Video Timing Structure to be read.

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the generator (Polarity, H/V values and horizontal offsets) by reading the configuration from a video mode short integer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
is a short integer predefined video mode.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the video timing structure settings currently used by generator in the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
is a pointer to a Video Timing Structure to be set.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the video mode currently used by the generator in the VTC core.

detaileddescription.para: If the video mode is unknown or not recognized, then 0 will be returned.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: VideoMode is the video mode of the VTC core.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the video timing structure settings currently reported by the detector in the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
is a pointer to a Video Timing structure to be set.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the video mode currently reported by the detector in the VTC core.

detaileddescription.para: If the video mode is unknown or not recognized, then 0 will be returned.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: VideoMode is the video mode of the VTC core.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the vertical front porch stretch mechanism in VTC core to support Adaptive-Sync feature.

detaileddescription.para: VTC core supports two types of stretch mechanisms. 1.Fixed stretch mode 2. Auto adjust mode

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance
is the type of mode that is being set.

simplesect.para: Modification of this register is fine irrespective of whether VTC has started or not.

briefdescription.para: This function disable Adaptive-Sync in VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function sets vertical front porch stretch limit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.
is the vertical front porch stretch limit to be set.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a reference to an XVtc_Config structure based on the core id, DeviceId.

detaileddescription.para: The return value will refer to an entry in the device configuration table defined in the xvtc_g.c file.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique core ID of the VTC core for the lookup operation.

simplesect.para: XVtc_LookupConfig returns a reference to a config record in the configuration table (in xvtc_g.c) corresponding to DeviceId, or NULL if no match is found.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the VTC core.

detaileddescription.para: This handler reads the pending interrupt from the IER/ISR, determines the source of the interrupts, calls according callbacks and finally clears the interrupts.

The application is responsible for connecting this function to the interrupt system. Application beyond this driver is also responsible for providing callbacks to handle interrupts and installing the callbacks using XVtc_SetCallBack() during initialization phase.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVtc instance that just interrupted.

briefdescription.para: This routine installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function Type ----------------------- -------------------------------------------------- XVTC_HANDLER_FRAMESYNC XVtc_FrameSyncCallBack XVTC_HANDLER_LOCK XVtc_LockCallBack XVTC_HANDLER_DETECTOR XVtc_DetectorCallBack XVTC_HANDLER_GENERATOR XVtc_GeneratorCallBack XVTC_HANDLER_ERROR XVtc_ErrCallBack

HandlerType Invoked by this driver when: ----------------------- -------------------------------------------------- XVTC_HANDLER_FRAMESYNC A frame sync event happens XVTC_HANDLER_LOCK A signal lock event happens XVTC_HANDLER_DETECTOR A detector related event happens XVTC_HANDLER_GENERATOR A generator related event happens XVTC_HANDLER_ERROR An error condition happens

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVtc instance to be worked on.
specifies which callback is to be attached.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This function reads version register of the VTC core and compares with zero as part of self test.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVtc instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the Version register read test was successful.
XST_FAILURE if the Version register read test failed.

briefdescription.para: Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.
This function macro resets the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function macro resets the VTC core after the next input frame is complete.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC core instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function macro enables synchronization of the Generator with the Detector on the given VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC core instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function macro enables updating timing registers at the end of each Generator frame.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC core instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function macro disables updating timing registers at the end of each Generator frame.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC core instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function macro disables synchronization of the Generator with the Detector on the given VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC core instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: This function macro gets the status of the Detector in the VTC core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC core instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: The Detector status. Use XVTC_DS_* in xvtc_hw.h to interpret the returned value.

briefdescription.para: This function macro enables individual interrupts of the VTC core by updating the IRQ_ENABLE register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC core instance to be worked on.

is the bit-mask of the interrupts to be enabled. Bit positions of 1 will be enabled. Bit positions of 0 will keep the previous setting. This mask is formed by OR'ing XVTC_IXR_*_MASK bits defined in xvtc_hw.h.

simplesect.para: The existing enabled interrupt(s) will remain enabled. C-style signature: void XVtc_IntrEnable(XVtc *InstancePtr, u32 IntrType)

briefdescription.para: This function macro disables individual interrupts of the VTC core by updating the IRQ_ENABLE register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC core instance to be worked on.

is the bit-mask of the interrupts to be disabled. Bit positions of 1 will be disabled. Bit positions of 0 will keep the previous setting. This mask is formed by OR'ing XVTC_IXR_*_MASK bits defined in xvtc_hw.h.

simplesect.para: Any other interrupt not covered by parameter IntrType, if enabled before this macro is called, will remain enabled. C-style signature: void XVtc_IntrDisable(XVtc *InstancePtr, u32 IntrType)

briefdescription.para: This function macro returns the pending interrupt status of the VTC core read from the Status register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC core instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: The status of pending interrupts of the VTC core. Use XVTC_IXR_*_MASK constants defined in xvtc_hw.h to interpret this value.

briefdescription.para: This function macro returns the pending interrupts of the VTC core for the interrupts that have been enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC core instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: The pending interrupts of the VTC core. Use XVTC_IXR_*_MASK constants defined in xvtc_hw.h to interpret this value. The returned value is a logical AND of the contents of the STATUS Register and the IRQ_ENABLE Register.

briefdescription.para: This function macro clears/acknowledges pending interrupts of the VTC core in the Status register.

detaileddescription.para: Bit positions of 1 will be cleared.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC core instance to be worked on.
is the pending interrupts to clear/acknowledge. Use OR'ing of XVTC_IXR_*_MASK constants defined in xvtc_hw.h to create this parameter value.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XVtc_IntrClear(XVtc *InstancePtr, u32 IntrType)

briefdescription.para: This function macro resets the VTC core after the next input frame is complete.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the VTC core instance to be worked on.

briefdescription.para: prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
This is main code of Xilinx MVI Video Timing Controller (VTC) device driver.

detaileddescription.para: This file contains static initialization methods for Xilinx VTC core.
This file contains the self test function for the VTC core.
This file contains interrupt related functions of Xilinx VTC core.
This header file contains identifiers and register-level core functions (or macros) that can be used to access the Xilinx VTC core.
The VTC device detects and generates video sync signals to Video IP cores like MVI Video Scaler. Please see xvtc.h for more details of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a xd 08/05/08 First release. 1.01a xd 07/23/10 Added GIER; Added more h/w generic info into xparameters.h; Feed callbacks with pending interrupt info. Added Doxygen & Version support. 3.00a cjm 08/01/12 Converted from xio.h to xil_io.h, translating basic types, MB cache functions, exceptions and assertions to xil_io format. Replaced the following: "XExc_Init" -> "Xil_ExceptionInit" "XExc_RegisterHandler" -> "Xil_ExceptionRegisterHandler" "XEXC_ID_NON_CRITICAL_INT" -> "XIL_EXCEPTION_ID_INT" "XExceptionHandler" -> "Xil_ExceptionHandler" "XExc_mEnableExceptions" -> "Xil_ExceptionEnable" "XEXC_NON_CRITICAL" -> "XIL_EXCEPTION_NON_CRITICAL" "XExc_DisableExceptions" -> "Xil_ExceptionDisable" "XExc_RemoveHandler" -> "Xil_ExceptionRemoveHandler" "microblaze_enable_interrupts" -> "Xil_ExceptionEnable" "microblaze_disable_interrupts" -> Xil_ExceptionDisable" "XCOMPONENT_IS_STARTED" -> "XIL_COMPONENT_IS_STARTED" "XCOMPONENT_IS_READY" -> "(XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY)"

"Xuint8" -> "u8" "Xuint16" -> "u16" "Xuint32" -> "u32" "Xint8" -> "char" "Xint16" -> "short" "Xint32" -> "long" "Xfloat32" -> "float" "Xfloat64" -> "double" "Xboolean" -> "int" "XTEST_FAILED" -> "XST_FAILURE" "XTEST_PASSED" -> "XST_SUCCESS" 4.00a cjm 02/08/13 Removed XVTC_CTL_HASS_MASK 5.00a cjm 08/07/13 Replaced CTL in Polarity and Encoding register definition with "POL" and "ENC" 5.00a cjm 10/30/13 Removed type parameter from XVtc_Enable which now enables both generator and detector. Added XVtc_EnableGenerator to enable only the Generator Added XVtc_EnableDetector to enable only the Detector 5.00a cjm 11/01/13 Added Timing, VideoMode and Signal Conversion Functions XVtc_ConvVideoMode2Timing XVtc_ConvTiming2Signal XVtc_ConvSignal2Timing XVtc_ConvTiming2VideoMode Added Timing and Video Mode Set/Get Functions XVtc_SetGeneratorTiming XVtc_SetGeneratorVideoMode XVtc_GetGeneratorTiming XVtc_GetGeneratorVideoMode XVtc_GetDetectorTiming XVtc_GetDetectorVideoMode Updated XVtc_GetGeneratorHoriOffset and XVtc_SetGeneratorHoriOffset. For adding interlaced or field-1 registers setting/getting updated XVtc_SetGenerator to align vsync to hsync horizontally by default. Added Field 1 set/get to XVtc_SetGenerator, XVtc_GetGenerator and XVtc_GetDetector. 5.00a cjm 11/03/13 Added Chroma/field parity bit masks. Replaced old timing bit masks/shifts with Start/End Bit masks/shifts. 6.1 adk 08/23/14 Modified HActiveVideo value to 1920 for XVTC_VMODE_1080I mode. Removed Major, Minor and Revision parameters from XVtc_GetVersion. Modified return type of XVtc_GetVersion from void to u32. 7.0 vns 25/02/15 Added progressive and interlaced mode switching feature. Modified XVtc_SetGenerator, XVtc_GetGenerator, XVtc_GetDetector, XVtc_ConvTiming2Signal and XVtc_ConvSignal2Timing APIs 7.1 vns 07/10/15 Corrected V0SyncStart and V1SyncStart values in APIs XVtc_ConvTiming2Signal and XVtc_ConvSignal2Timing Corrected register read to XVTC_DVSYNC_F1_OFFSET in API XVtc_GetDetector vns 10/14/15 Modified XVtc_SetSource API to provided programming interlaced mode feature and modified XVtc_GetSource API to read interlaced mode status. Corrected XVtc_ConvSignal2Timing API to get interlaced mode from SignalCfgPtr structure. 7.2 mh 04/20/16 Removed call to XVtc_Reset from XVtc_CfgInitialize. sk 08/16/16 Used UINTPTR instead of u32 for Baseaddress as part of adding 64 bit support. CR# 867425. Changed the prototype of XVtc_CfgInitialize API. 8.0 jsr 07/03/18 Added a new register XVTC_GASIZE_F1_OFFSET for interlaced modes FIELD1 vactive size. This value is same as FILED0 vactive size for all interlaced modes except for SDI NTSC mode jsr 10/01/18 Removed the hard coded programming of vactive size values based on resolutions. Moved the hard coded values for SDI NTSC resolution to SDI TXSS driver instead of in VTC driver. jsr 10/03/18 Corrected the VGA resolution timing parameters w.r.t the timing values given in the VTC GUI for 640x480p 8.2 rg 08/12/20 Implemented XVtc_SetAdaptiveSyncMode, XVtc_DisableAdaptiveSync and XVtc_SetVfpStretchLimit API's.

detaileddescription.para: For more information about the operation of this core, see the hardware specification and documentation in the higher level driver xvtc.h source code file.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a xd 08/05/08 First release. 1.01a xd 07/23/10 Added GIER. Added more h/w generic info into xparameters.h. Feed callbacks with pending interrupt info. Added Doxygen & Version support. 2.00a cm 05/25/11 Renamed XVTC_CTL_GACS_MASK to XVTC_CTL_GACLS_MASKl. Added XVTC_CTL_GACPS_MASK. 3.00a cjm 08/01/12 Converted from xio.h to xil_io.h, translating basic types, MB cache functions, exceptions and assertions to xil_io format. Replaced the following "XExc_Init" -> "Xil_ExceptionInit" "XExc_RegisterHandler" -> "Xil_ExceptionRegisterHandler" "XEXC_ID_NON_CRITICAL_INT" -> "XIL_EXCEPTION_ID_INT" "XExceptionHandler" -> "Xil_ExceptionHandler" "XExc_mEnableExceptions" -> "Xil_ExceptionEnable" "XEXC_NON_CRITICAL" -> "XIL_EXCEPTION_NON_CRITICAL" "XExc_DisableExceptions" -> "Xil_ExceptionDisable" "XExc_RemoveHandler" -> "Xil_ExceptionRemoveHandler" "microblaze_enable_interrupts" -> "Xil_Exception Enable" "microblaze_disable_interrupts" -> "Xil_Exception Disable"

"Xuint8" -> "u8" "Xuint16" -> "u16" "Xuint32" -> "u32" "Xint8" -> "char" "Xint16" -> "short" "Xint32" -> "long" "Xfloat32" -> "float" "Xfloat64" -> "double" "Xboolean" -> "int" "XTEST_FAILED" -> "XST_FAILURE" "XTEST_PASSED" -> "XST_SUCCESS" 3.00a cjm 08/02/12 Changed XVTC_RESET_RESET_MASK from 0x0000_000a to 0x8000_0000 4.00a cjm 02/07/13 Remove Unused defines: XVTC_GIER, XVTC_GIER_GIE_MASK. 4.00a cjm 02/08/13 Removed XVTC_CTL_HASS_MASK. 5.00a cjm 08/06/13 Replaced CTL in Polarity and Encoding register definition with "POL" and "ENC". Renamed XVTC_RESET_RESET_MASK to XVTC_CTL_RESET_MASK. Renamed XVTC_SYNC_RESET_MASK to XVTC_CTL_SRST_MASK. Renamed Error register bit defs to XVTC_ERR_* Added Patch and Internal Revision MASKs for. Revision register. 5.00a cjm 11/01/13 Removed Unused Hori Offset registers defines from 0x0a0 - 0x0c0A Added interlaced register defines. Changed Version Register Revision shift from 12 to 8 and changed mask to be 8 instead of 4 bits wide 5.00a cjm 11/03/13 Added Chroma/field parity bit masks. Replaced old timing bit masks/shifts with Start/End Bit masks/shifts. 6.1 adk 08/23/14 Removed XVTC_ERR_FIL_MASK macro because it is not present in latest product guide. Modified register offsets from XVTC_* to XVTC_*_OFFSET for consistency. Added backward compatibility macros. 7.1 vns 10/14/15 Added XVTC_CTL_INTERLACE_MASK macro and modified XVTC_CTL_ALLSS_MASK 8.0 jsr 07/03/18 Added new register XVTC_GASIZE_F1_OFFSET

detaileddescription.para: Please see xvtc.h for more details of the core.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a xd 08/05/08 First release 1.01a xd 07/23/10 Added GIER. Added more h/w generic info into xparameters.h. Feed callbacks with pending interrupt info. Added Doxygen & Version support. 3.00a cjm 08/01/12 Converted from xio.h to xil_io.h, translating basic types, MB cache functions, exceptions and assertions to xil_io format. Replaced the following: "XExc_Init" -> "Xil_ExceptionInit" "XExc_RegisterHandler" -> "Xil_Exception RegisterHandler" "XEXC_ID_NON_CRITICAL_INT" -> "XIL_EXCEPTION_ID_INT" "XExceptionHandler" -> "Xil_ExceptionHandler" "XExc_mEnableExceptions" -> "Xil_ExceptionEnable" "XEXC_NON_CRITICAL" -> "XIL_EXCEPTION_NON_CRITICAL" "XExc_DisableExceptions" -> "Xil_ExceptionDisable" "XExc_RemoveHandler" -> "Xil_ExceptionRemoveHandler" "microblaze_enable_interrupts" -> "Xil_Exception Enable" "microblaze_disable_interrupts" -> "Xil_Exception Disable" "XCOMPONENT_IS_STARTED" -> "XIL_COMPONENT_IS_STARTED" "XCOMPONENT_IS_READY" -> "XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY" "XASSERT_NONVOID" -> "Xil_AssertNonvoid" "XASSERT_VOID_ALWAYS" -> "Xil_AssertVoidAlways" "XASSERT_VOID" -> "Xil_AssertVoid" "Xil_AssertVoid_ALWAYS" -> "Xil_AssertVoidAlways" "XAssertStatus" -> "Xil_AssertStatus" "XAssertSetCallback" -> "Xil_AssertCallback"

"Xuint8" -> "u8" "Xuint16" -> "u16" "Xuint32" -> "u32" "Xint8" -> "char" "Xint16" -> "short" "Xint32" -> "long" "Xfloat32" -> "float" "Xfloat64" -> "double" "Xboolean" -> "int" "XTEST_FAILED" -> "XST_FAILURE" "XTEST_PASSED" -> "XST_SUCCESS" 6.1 adk 08/23/14 Aligned doxygen tags. 8.2 pg 04/03/20 Fixed Interrupt handler issue

detaileddescription.para: The self test function reads the Version register.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
6.1 adk 08/23/14 First Release. Implemented following function: XVtc_SelfTest.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a xd 08/05/08 First release. 1.01a xd 07/23/10 Added GIER; Added more h/w generic info into xparameters.h. Feed callbacks with pending interrupt info. Added Doxygen & Version support. 3.00a cjm 08/01/12 Converted from xio.h to xil_io.h, translating basic types, MB cache functions, exceptions and assertions to xil_io format. Replaced the following: "Xuint16" -> "u16". 6.1 adk 08/23/14 updated doxygen tags. 7.1 als 08/11/16 Provide protection against driver inclusion in the absence of VTC instantiation.
